## Meeting Purpose

[Kick off an 8-week strategy sprint with GrowthX to improve Rimkus' SEO/AEO and drive more qualified leads across their business segments.](https://fathom.video/share/6F8syswVbrZ4DuvdzNRHU9mtvZPnUoSY?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Rimkus has two main business segments: Forensics (reactive) and Built Environment Services (BES, proactive)](https://fathom.video/share/6F8syswVbrZ4DuvdzNRHU9mtvZPnUoSY?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [BES is the priority for growth, with structural services as the initial focus](https://fathom.video/share/6F8syswVbrZ4DuvdzNRHU9mtvZPnUoSY?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)
  - [Key challenges: limited team bandwidth, expert availability for content, and multi-level review process](https://fathom.video/share/6F8syswVbrZ4DuvdzNRHU9mtvZPnUoSY?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)
  - [Success metrics: increased leads, improved attribution, and growth in targeted territories/expert utilization](https://fathom.video/share/6F8syswVbrZ4DuvdzNRHU9mtvZPnUoSY?tab=summary&timestamp=1795.0)

## Topics

### Rimkus Business Overview

  - [Two main segments: Forensics (reactive) and Built Environment Services (BES, proactive)](https://fathom.video/share/6F8syswVbrZ4DuvdzNRHU9mtvZPnUoSY?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Life Sciences as a smaller segment](https://fathom.video/share/6F8syswVbrZ4DuvdzNRHU9mtvZPnUoSY?tab=summary&timestamp=1719.0)
  - [Forensics: larger, established business; covers diverse areas (e.g., toxicology, construction claims)](https://fathom.video/share/6F8syswVbrZ4DuvdzNRHU9mtvZPnUoSY?tab=summary&timestamp=810.0)
  - [BES: newer, growing segment; covers entire lifecycle of built assets](https://fathom.video/share/6F8syswVbrZ4DuvdzNRHU9mtvZPnUoSY?tab=summary&timestamp=1667.0)
  - [Value proposition: expertise, cost savings, proactive planning, code compliance](https://fathom.video/share/6F8syswVbrZ4DuvdzNRHU9mtvZPnUoSY?tab=summary&timestamp=1921.0)

### Growth Priorities and Challenges

  - [BES identified as main growth area by leadership](https://fathom.video/share/6F8syswVbrZ4DuvdzNRHU9mtvZPnUoSY?tab=summary&timestamp=1728.0)
  - [Structural services within BES as initial focus for content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/6F8syswVbrZ4DuvdzNRHU9mtvZPnUoSY?tab=summary&timestamp=1432.0)
  - [Challenges:](https://fathom.video/share/6F8syswVbrZ4DuvdzNRHU9mtvZPnUoSY?tab=summary&timestamp=1133.0)
      - [Limited marketing team bandwidth](https://fathom.video/share/6F8syswVbrZ4DuvdzNRHU9mtvZPnUoSY?tab=summary&timestamp=1133.0)
      - [Reliance on technical experts for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/6F8syswVbrZ4DuvdzNRHU9mtvZPnUoSY?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)
      - [Multi-level review process (marketing, technical, legal considerations)](https://fathom.video/share/6F8syswVbrZ4DuvdzNRHU9mtvZPnUoSY?tab=summary&timestamp=1165.0)
      - [Difficulty in communicating full range of services to existing clients](https://fathom.video/share/6F8syswVbrZ4DuvdzNRHU9mtvZPnUoSY?tab=summary&timestamp=2901.0)

### Current Marketing Landscape

  - [Website as primary lead source, mostly organic traffic](https://fathom.video/share/6F8syswVbrZ4DuvdzNRHU9mtvZPnUoSY?tab=summary&timestamp=2784.0)
  - [Webinars and in-person seminars effective for engagement](https://fathom.video/share/6F8syswVbrZ4DuvdzNRHU9mtvZPnUoSY?tab=summary&timestamp=2811.0)
  - [Some paid advertising (Google Ads, LinkedIn) - currently paused](https://fathom.video/share/6F8syswVbrZ4DuvdzNRHU9mtvZPnUoSY?tab=summary&timestamp=2817.0)
  - [Case studies and thought leadership content as growth opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/6F8syswVbrZ4DuvdzNRHU9mtvZPnUoSY?tab=summary&timestamp=3028.0)
  - [Need for better attribution and measurement of marketing efforts](https://fathom.video/share/6F8syswVbrZ4DuvdzNRHU9mtvZPnUoSY?tab=summary&timestamp=2693.0)

### Customer Acquisition and Retention

  - [100% win rate when able to engage with potential clients](https://fathom.video/share/6F8syswVbrZ4DuvdzNRHU9mtvZPnUoSY?tab=summary&timestamp=413.0)
  - [Loss of opportunities due to slow response times on inquiries](https://fathom.video/share/6F8syswVbrZ4DuvdzNRHU9mtvZPnUoSY?tab=summary&timestamp=2291.0)
  - [Manual process for routing inquiries causing delays](https://fathom.video/share/6F8syswVbrZ4DuvdzNRHU9mtvZPnUoSY?tab=summary&timestamp=2395.0)
  - [Competitors often local, smaller firms offering lower prices](https://fathom.video/share/6F8syswVbrZ4DuvdzNRHU9mtvZPnUoSY?tab=summary&timestamp=2167.0)
  - [Clients sometimes return after negative experiences with cheaper alternatives](https://fathom.video/share/6F8syswVbrZ4DuvdzNRHU9mtvZPnUoSY?tab=summary&timestamp=2221.0)

### Content Strategy Opportunities

  - [Develop targeted content based on seminar/webinar attendance](https://fathom.video/share/6F8syswVbrZ4DuvdzNRHU9mtvZPnUoSY?tab=summary&timestamp=3000.0)
  - [Create more relevant, updated case studies](https://fathom.video/share/6F8syswVbrZ4DuvdzNRHU9mtvZPnUoSY?tab=summary&timestamp=3028.0)
  - [Improve storytelling to connect different services offered](https://fathom.video/share/6F8syswVbrZ4DuvdzNRHU9mtvZPnUoSY?tab=summary&timestamp=2901.0)
  - [Educate clients on full range of Rimkus capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/6F8syswVbrZ4DuvdzNRHU9mtvZPnUoSY?tab=summary&timestamp=2901.0)
  - [Optimize existing content, especially evergreen pieces](https://fathom.video/share/6F8syswVbrZ4DuvdzNRHU9mtvZPnUoSY?tab=summary&timestamp=2761.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule deep-dive sessions for Forensics and BES segments](https://fathom.video/share/6F8syswVbrZ4DuvdzNRHU9mtvZPnUoSY?tab=summary&timestamp=3632.0)
  - [Rimkus team to provide additional context: brand guidelines, review processes, expert/territory growth targets](https://fathom.video/share/6F8syswVbrZ4DuvdzNRHU9mtvZPnUoSY?tab=summary&timestamp=3251.0)
  - [GrowthX to send meeting recap and set up next week's introduction to content team](https://fathom.video/share/6F8syswVbrZ4DuvdzNRHU9mtvZPnUoSY?tab=summary&timestamp=3636.0)
  - [Begin collaboration on content strategy, focusing on BES/structural services](https://fathom.video/share/6F8syswVbrZ4DuvdzNRHU9mtvZPnUoSY?tab=summary&timestamp=3632.0)
  - [Explore options for improving lead routing and response times](https://fathom.video/share/6F8syswVbrZ4DuvdzNRHU9mtvZPnUoSY?tab=summary&timestamp=3679.0)
